item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested N+1 split by saying not to open another transfer channel. It recognizes the pattern of repeated local routing/queue fixes across timeout, missing materials, compensation, and transfer disputes, moves upstream to routing authority, dispute rules, data collection, and intake/exception consolidation, and proposes using tags and existing supervisor review instead of another queue. No fail signal of directly adding a new channel is present."}
